title: Rich Mexican Chickpea Stir-fry
description: A rich and indulgent mexican dish featuring tender chickpeas marinated in a flavorful blend of spices, herbs, and dairy-free elements.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté for about 2 minutes or until fragrant.
Drain the chickpeas and add them to the skillet. Stir-fry for about 5-7 minutes, breaking up any clumps of chickpeas with a spatula.
Pour in lime juice and sprinkle oregano over the chickpeas. Toss well to coat evenly.
Add the julienned bell peppers and stir until heated through.
Season with salt and pepper as needed.
